message:
fix: retry hook lookup and search town beads for rig agents (GH#1438)

Cherry-picks useful fixes from community PR #2007 (ryanmaclean):

1. Retry logic in findAgentWork: polecats/crew retry up to 3 times with
   2s delays to handle the timing race where hook state hasn't propagated
   by the time gt prime runs on session startup.

2. Town-level bead search in molecule_status: the "list by assignee"
   fallback path now also checks townRoot/.beads for hq-* beads slung
   to rig-level agents by the Mayor.

The PR's prime.go town-level search is not needed because the current
code already uses beads.ResolveHookDir() for prefix-based routing.
Other PR changes (README Tundra Dome docs, mayor pane recovery, mail
check cache, mail inbox nil-check, patrol_helpers sprintf fix) were
either scope creep or already fixed on main.

Co-authored-by: Ryan MacLean <ryanmaclean@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
